title: lobularia longicaulis
intro: Lobularia longicaulis, also known as Sweet Alyssum or Sweet Alison, is a flowering plant species that belongs to the Brassicaceae family. The plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and expectorant properties, making it useful in treating respiratory issues such as bronchitis and coughs. Consuming Lobularia longicaulis has been associated with various health benefits, including reducing inflammation, improving digestion, and supporting the immune system. The plant can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are often used to alleviate symptoms of colds, flu, and other respiratory infections.
